business.headline: Using offshore gaming apps? Nithin Kamath warns of rising scam risksAfter restrictions were imposed on several real-money gaming platforms, many offshore betting apps have started appearing across social media and messaging platforms.

Will your pocket feel the pinch?Global oil prices have surged past $110 as the Gulf conflict disrupts shipments through the Strait of Hormuz, one of the world's most critical oil routes. The spike has raised concerns about fuel prices, inflation and the broader impact on household budgets.

Meesho shares slide 10% after Rs 1,500 crore tax demand for FY24. Details hereMeesho said it is currently reviewing the assessment order and does not agree with the observations made by the tax authority.
The company added that it has adequate legal and factual grounds to challenge the demand and will take the necessary steps to protect its interests.

SBI share price falls 6%: Should you sell or hold the PSU stock?The share price fall wiped out nearly Rs 62,352 crore in market capitalisation. With this drop, the bank's valuation slipped below the Rs 10 lakh crore mark to around Rs 9.93 lakh crore.

Rupee falls to record low amid crude oil shock: What it means for IndiaThe rupee dropped 0.6% to 92.3350 against the US dollar, breaking its previous record low of 92.3025 that was touched last week. Rupee has remained under pressure since the United States and Israel launched military action against Iran last week.

Stock market crash: IndiGo, SBI, Maruti among worst hit amid ongoing sell-offAmong the worst-hit stocks on the index were InterGlobe Aviation (IndiGo) and State Bank of India (SBI), reflecting the broad-based nature of the market decline.

Rupee sinks to all-time low of Rs 92.30 against US dollar as oil prices riseThe rupee slipped in early trade as investors turned cautious amid escalating geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and a sharp spike in global oil prices.

Why Sensex crashed over 2,000 points todayRising Middle East tensions, a sharp spike in crude oil prices and renewed foreign investor selling triggered a steep sell-off on Dalal Street, sending benchmark indices sharply lower in early trade.

Monday meltdown as Sensex tanks over 2,000 points over oil, Gulf crisisRising oil prices and escalating tensions in West Asia rattled investors, triggering heavy selling on Dalal Street as benchmark indices tumbled sharply, and most sectors traded deep in the red.

Sensex, Nifty opening: Stock market to crash today? Check trading setupAt around 8:25 am, GIFT Nifty futures were trading at 23,749. This signals a nearly 3% drop for the Nifty 50 from Friday's closing level of 24,450.45.

Why your bank keeps pushing insurance plans you may not needYou trust your bank for financial advice and investments. But what if the person across the desk is under pressure to sell something else? In this article, we look at how sales targets shape what bank relationship managers recommend.

Let's set the record straight: Women are better at managing money than menThe financial world has long been seen as a man's playground. Yet from household budgets to investment portfolios, women are steadily proving that patience, discipline and long-term thinking, not risky bets, are often the real keys to managing money well.

Are bank lockers still the safest place for your valuables?Bank lockers are trusted to store gold and valuables, but recent cases have raised questions about safety. At the same time, getting a bank locker itself has become increasingly difficult, with waiting lists stretching months or even years in many cities.

Domestic LPG price hiked by Rs 60, commercial cylinder up Rs 115 amid Iran warIndustry officials said the increase reflects a surge in global energy costs triggered by tensions and disruptions in West Asia, a region critical to global oil and gas supply chains.

Wall Street slides as weak jobs data, Middle East tensions rattle marketsthe Middle East conflict pushed up oil prices the most this week since Russia's 2022 invasion of Ukraine, bringing shipping through the strategic Strait of Hormuz to a halt.

Tariff refund system to be ready in 45 days: US customs agencyThe US Supreme Court had struck down Trump's tariffs, but did ⁠not say how the collected levies should be refunded, worrying small importers that the process would be prohibitively expensive and time-consuming.

Prachar Communications' Manyavar Mohey viral campaign crosses 300 million viewsThe campaign has already generated over 8 million organic likes and has crossed 100 million cumulative views on Instagram on the celebrity collaboration post within 72 hours, marking one of the largest celebrity-led moment marketing activations in India.

entertainment.headline: He is doing fine, need your prayers: YouTuber UK07 Rider Anurag Dobhal's wife UK07 Rider Anurag Dobhal's wife Ritika has shared a health update after the YouTuber's shocking car crash. The incident followed a livestream in which he called the drive his "final."

Dhurandhar 2 on OTT: When and where to watch Aditya Dhar's thriller Aditya Dhar's spy thriller Dhurandhar 2, starring Ranveer Singh, is set for a theatrical release on March 19. As fans eagerly await the sequel, here's when the film is expected to arrive on OTT.

This has delayed the film's certification process indefinitely.

Priyanka Chopra's Women's Day post celebrates women who shaped her On International Women's Day, Priyanka Chopra shared a heartfelt tribute to the influential women in her life. In her post, Chopra also included a quote by Coco Chanel.

YRF postpones Alia Bhatt's Alpha for the second time, confirms theatrical release YRF's Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, has been postponed yet again. The spy-universe film will now release in cinemas in the second half of the year.

With over two lakh tickets sold in two days and Rs 18.11 crore collected, the film's pre-release momentum is hard to ignore.

Calm, composure, dominance: Big B, SRK to Jr NTR, stars celebrate India's victory India celebrated its historic T20 World Cup victory as Bollywood and South film stars joined fans in congratulating the team online. Under Suryakumar Yadav's captaincy, India became the first side to defend the title and win the tournament on home soil.

Alia Bhatt shares heartfelt Women's Day card from daughter Raha, Ranbir Kapoor Actor Alia Bhatt revealed how her daughter Raha and husband Ranbir Kapoor made Women's Day memorable by creating a special card. She shared a thoughtful message about raising daughters.

Basil Joseph turns ultimate fanboy for Sanju Samson at T20 World Cup Final. Watch Malayalam actor Basil Joseph was seen enthusiastically supporting his friend Sanju Samson during India's T20 World Cup triumph. The actor proudly bought a jersey and dubbed himself president of Sanju's Kerala fan club.

Anirudh reveals SRK-Rajinikanth collab dream, sparks Jailer 2 buzz online Composer Anirudh Ravichander said working with Rajinikanth and Kamal Haasan on a recent promotional shoot felt surreal, while fans on social media began speculating whether the collaboration hints at developments around Jailer 2.

Jr NTR mobbed at Bengaluru hospital, fans damage escalator in frenzy Large crowds gathered at KIMS Hospitals in Bengaluru for actor Jr NTR's appearance, leading to security breaches, damage to property, and intervention by police. Videos of the incident were shared online.

Shots fired outside Rihanna's Beverly Hills home, 30-year-old woman arrested A 30-year-old woman was arrested after allegedly firing multiple shots at Rihanna's Beverly Hills mansion while the pop star was home.  According to the Los Angeles Police Department, no injuries were reported.

Selena Gomez showers husband Benny Blanco with birthday love, shares throwback pics Actor-singer Selena Gomez shared glimpses of her happy married life with Benny Blanco to wish him on his birthday. The singer-songwriter marked his 38th birthday on March 9, 2026.

Aishwarya-Abhishek light up wedding with Salaam-E-Ishq dance, Nita Ambani joins Aishwarya Rai and Abhishek Bachchan danced at Mudit Adani and Ananya Diwanji's wedding to Salaam-E-Ishq song. The couple also made a recent appearance together at Arjun Tendulkar and Saaniya Chandhok's Mumbai wedding.

No fear, all heart: Anushka, Sunny, Anil, others celebrate India's World Cup win Bollywood celebrities, including Anushka Sharma, Ajay Devgn and Anil Kapoor, celebrated India's historic T20 World Cup victory on social media. Their posts reflected national pride as Team India beat New Zealand.

general news.headline: Interest of Indian consumer always overriding priority: Jaishankar on Iran warMaking a statement in the Rajya Sabha amid sloganeering by opposition MPs, Jaishankar said the conflict in the region had intensified in recent days, raising concerns over energy supplies, shipping routes and global trade flows.

Does India have low-cost killer kamikaze drones like Iran's Shahed?Low-cost drones are reshaping warfare, as seen in Ukraine for the last four years, and now in the Iran war. Iran's low-cost Shahed drones have inspired the US's LUCAS. In India, low-cost, deep-strike drone projects like Sheshnag-150 and Project KAL are picking pace.

Live: Saudi Arabia warns Iran it will be 'biggest loser' after drone attack on Shaybah oil fieldUS-Israel Attacks Iran Live Updates: As the Middle East war entered its 10th day, Iran launched fresh attacks on Israel and several Gulf countries on Monday, hours after state television reported that Mojtaba Khamenei, son of the country's late supreme leader, had been named his successor. The escalation rattled global markets, sending oil prices sharply higher and sparking fears that rising energy costs could fuel inflation and curb consumer spending in the United States. Meanwhile, Saudi Arabia warned Tehran it would be the "biggest loser" if attacks on Arab states continued after a drone strike targeted its Shaybah oil field. Follow indiatoday.in for all latest updates on the Middle East crisis.

Chennai doctor hands newborn to nervous father in video with 198 million viewsThe video showed Dr Suganya Saravanakumar handing the newborn baby to the father. However, the man was so nervous that his hands trembled as he prepared to hold the child.

How Robotic Knee Replacement is Redefining the Journey Back to MobilityEarly consultation with an orthopaedic specialist is essential. Delaying surgery in severe cases can lead to worsening deformity and reduced functional outcomes.

How China is the biggest silent player in the Iran warAs the US and Israel fight Iran, China might look to be a silent spectator, but it is much more than that. Tehran is crucial for Beijing's oil supply, influence in the Middle East, and long-term Taiwan strategy. This makes the Middle East conflict far more significant for China than it might appear to be.

Do elites 'hate' a mainstream sport?Pickleball had its moment. Now, padel is the new obsession. But behind the switch is there a bigger story about status, relevance, and exclusivity that we are missing?

CBI summons Vijay again for questioning in Karur stampede probe on TuesdayThe investigation pertains to the stampede that occurred on September 27, 2025, during a political rally addressed by Vijay in Karur district of Tamil Nadu. The tragedy resulted in 41 deaths and injuries to another 60 people.

In photos: Inside India's T20 World Cup victory celebrationT20 World Cup: India delivered a ruthless all-round performance in Ahmedabad, overpowering New Zealand to defend their T20 World Cup crown as Abhishek Sharma, Sanju Samson, and Jasprit Bumrah headlined a dominant night.

Live: Lok Sabha adjourned till 3 pm after sloganeering during Jaishankar's speechBudget Session Live Updates: The second half of Parliament's Budget session had a turbulent start on Monday, with Opposition MPs raising slogans as External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar briefed the Rajya Sabha over the Middle East war. The Lok Sabha is scheduled to take up an opposition-sponsored resolution seeking the removal of Speaker Om Birla. The motion, backed by several opposition parties accusing Birla of acting in a "partisan" manner, is expected to trigger a sharp face-off with the ruling BJP, which has issued a whip to ensure MPs' presence in the House. Opposition parties are also expected to raise issues including electoral roll revisions in West Bengal. Stay tuned to indiatoday.in for all the latest updates.

Live: Mathematics exam about to end, paper analysis at 1:30 pmThe CBSE Class 12 Mathematics Board Exam 2026 is being conducted today, March 9, at examination centres across India and abroad, and the exam has now begun. The paper started at 10:30 am and will conclude at 1:30 pm, giving students three hours to complete the 80-mark theory exam. CBSE has issued an advisory urging students, parents, and schools to avoid spreading or believing fake news and rumours related to the CBSE Board Exams 2026. The board has asked everyone to rely only on official updates and verified information.

Rs 70,000 crore fake biryani billing prompts nationwide tax raids at restaurantsRoutine checks at restaurants in Hyderabad last November led tax officers to spot discrepancies between customer footfall and lower sales recorded in billing software, prompting a deeper investigation.

sports.headline: Sanju Samson is a combination of Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma: Kumble T20 World Cup final: Anil Kumble said that Sanju Samson was a mix of Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma after delivering a record-breaking performance for India at the ICC Men's T20 World Cup. Samson scored three consecutive fifties after returning to the playing XI and helping India win the title.

Ravi Shastri slammed after ruining India's T20 World Cup-winning moment on commentary Ravi Shastri called the final wicket of India's historic T20 World Cup win the ninth, not the tenth. The gaffe immediately went viral, overshadowing one of cricket's greatest moments.

Suryakumar Yadav just like Rohit Sharma, cool, calm and collected: Sunil Gavaskar T20 World Cup: Sunil Gavaskar compared Suryakumar Yadav's calm and composed leadership to Rohit Sharma after India's T20 World Cup triumph. With the win, Suryakumar joined Dhoni, Rohit and Kapil Dev as World Cup-winning Indian captains.

We are unfortunate that Sanju Samson saved his best for T20 World Cup: Santner T20 World Cup final: Mitchell Santner said that his side was unfortunate to face the wrath of Sanju Samson after having got the better of him during the T20I series against India earlier in the year. Samson scored 89 in the final to help India win the trophy.

India's 2026 T20 champions the best ever? Harbhajan shuts Rohit-Dhoni era comparisons T20 World Cup: Harbhajan Singh urged fans not to compare India's 2026 T20 World Cup champions with past teams. The former spinner said every era is different, even as he praised the current side for taking T20 cricket to another level.

Another prediction backfires: Amir reacts angrily as India win T20 World Cup T20 World Cup final: Mohammad Amir had an angry reaction when asked about getting his prediction wrong after India won the T20 World Cup 2026 title. Amir also criticised New Zealand for handing the trophy to India.

Not just God's plan: Gautam Gambhir credits Indian fans for T20 World Cup triumph India's head coach Gautam Gambhir dedicated the T20 World Cup title to 1.4 billion fans, calling it the plan of an entire nation after India's historic 96-run win over New Zealand in the final.

India have ruined cricket: Salty Shoaib Akhtar reacts to one-sided T20 World Cup win T20 World Cup: Shoaib Akhtar lashed out after India's dominant T20 World Cup triumph, claiming the team has "ruined cricket." The former Pakistan pacer compared India to a rich kid dominating neighbourhood games.

Are we living in India's era of dominance in ICC events? Coach Gambhir reacts T20 World Cup final: Gautam Gambhir refused to say that it is an era of dominance for India in ICC events after they lifted the T20 World Cup crown. It was India's second ICC title win in a row.

Watch: Gavaskar keeps T20 World Cup promise, dances with Suryakumar T20 World Cup final: Sunil Gavaskar kept his promise to Suryakumar Yadav and danced with the Indian captain after India retained their T20 World Cup crown in Ahmedabad. Gavaskar heaped praise on Suryakumar after the win.

Emotional Ishan Kishan dedicates T20 World Cup triumph to late cousin sister T20 World Cup: Ishan Kishan revealed he lost his cousin sister in a car accident a day before the T20 World Cup final. The emotional wicketkeeper-batter dedicated India's historic triumph to her memory after the win.

In photos: Inside India's T20 World Cup victory celebrationT20 World Cup: India delivered a ruthless all-round performance in Ahmedabad, overpowering New Zealand to defend their T20 World Cup crown as Abhishek Sharma, Sanju Samson, and Jasprit Bumrah headlined a dominant night.

Why didn't Glenn Phillips bowl more in T20 World Cup final? Santner explainsT20 World Cup final: Mitchell Santner explained the reason why he used Glenn Phillips for one over during the T20 World Cup final against India in Ahmedabad. New Zealand also dropped Cole McConchie for the contest.

Three-time world champions, are India the greatest T20I side ever?T20 World Cup final: No men's team had successfully defended the T20 World Cup before this. India are now the only side to win three T20 World Cup titles, defend the trophy, and lift it on home soil. With achievements that no other team in the format can match, are India now staking its claim as the greatest T20I side ever?

The boy who stayed: Suryakumar Yadav's 25-year wait for a Sunday in the sunHe waited longer than most for the India cap, longer still for the spotlight. Now in Ahmedabad, Suryakumar Yadav stands as proof that sometimes the game's brightest stars bloom last. From the boy who lingered at the nets in Anushakti Nagar to a World Cup-winning captain, this is his story.

Fearless, ruthless, peerless: India make the World Cup final a one-team showT20 World Cup: India didn't win the World Cup final. They annexed it. From the first ball to the last, New Zealand were spectators to something they had no answer for.

After T20 World Cup win, India's next target is LA Olympics: SuryakumarLA Olympics in 2028 is India's next target, revealed India captain Suryakumar Yadav at the post-match press conference. The Indian cricket team is set to feature in the Olympics for the first time with the sport's return to competition.

Virat Kohli's special message to 'chetta' Samson after Player of the Tournament awardT20 World Cup final, IND vs NZ: Star India batter Virat Kohli wrote a special message for Sanju Samson after he won the Player of the Tournament award after India's historic T20 World Cup 2026 triumph, beating New Zealand by 96 runs in the final at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad.

Gambhir dedicates T20 WC win to Dravid and Laxman, says Jay Shah stood by himIndia head coach Gautam Gambhir has dedicated the team's T20 World Cup 2026 triumph to Rahul Dravid, VVS Laxman, Ajit Agarkar and Jay Shah. India beat New Zealand by 96 runs to win their third T20 World Cup title.

MS Dhoni raves about Gautam Gambhir's smile after India win T20 World CupT20 World Cup 2026 final: MS Dhoni breaks his social media hiatus with a poignant tribute to Gautam Gambhir and Jasprit Bumrah after India crushed New Zealand by 96 runs in the final in Ahmedabad.

Suryakumar, Gambhir, Jay Shah visit Hanuman temple hours after T20 World Cup winIndia captain Suryakumar Yadav, head coach Gautam Gambhir, and ICC chief Jay Shah took the T20 World Cup trophy to a Hanuman temple only hours after India's win over New Zealand. The trio offered their prayers in the temple.

Justice for Samson, smile Gambhir: Arshdeep's reels after World Cup win go viralT20 World Cup 2026 final: Arshdeep Singh posted a series of reels after India hammered New Zealand in the final in Ahmedabad. The ones featuring Sanju Samson and Gautam Gambhir stole the show, as the left-arm pacer once again proved he is the king of comedy in the dressing room.

Not accountable to social media, only to people in the changing room: Gautam GambhirAfter India defended their T20 World Cup crown in Ahmedabad, head coach Gautam Gambhir said he is accountable only to the players and support staff in the dressing room, not to people on social media.

With Maheika by his side, Hardik wants to win 10 more trophiesIndia all-rounder Hardik Pandya is confident that he will win 5 or 6 more ICC trophies in his career. After the T20 World Cup win, Hardik thanked his partner, Maheika Sharma, stating that since she came into his life, he has been winning everything.

Jasprit Bumrah delighted to bury Ahmedabad ghosts after T20 World Cup triumphT20 World Cup final, IND vs NZ: India fast bowler Jasprit Bumrah said that he was delighted to bury the ghosts of the ODI World Cup 2023 final after winning the T20 World Cup 2026 at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad.

T20 World Cup: Fans celebrate across the nation after India defend T20 crownFans celebrated across the nation after the Indian team created history on Sunday, clinching an unprecedented third consecutive T20 World Cup title by demolishing New Zealand by 96 runs in the final in Ahmedabad. The Narendra Modi Stadium turned into a sea of blue as jubilant supporters watched India etch its name deeper into the history books with a dominant victory.

Named player of the tournament, Samson reveals he took help from Sachin TendulkarT20 World Cup 2026, IND vs NZ Final: Named player of the tournament for three successive 80-plus scores, Sanju Samson revealed he leaned on guidance from Sachin Tendulkar. Samson smashed 89 off 46 balls in India's 96-run win over New Zealand in the final.

No match for explosive cricket played by India: Virat Kohli on T20 World Cup triumphStar India batter Virat Kohli congratulated team India for winning the T20 World Cup 2026, beating New Zealand by 96 runs in the final at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad.

India's historic Men's T20 World Cup title defence: In StatsT20 World Cup, IND vs NZ: India won their third title after beating New Zealand by 96 runs in the final on Sunday, March 8 at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad. The Men in Blue scored 255 for five after which they bowled the Kiwis out for 159 in 19 overs.

Ruthless India defeat history in Ahmedabad, defend T20 World Cup crownT20 World Cup, IND vs NZ final: India hammered New Zealand in a one-sided final, posting 255 and then defending it by 96 runs in Ahmedabad on Sunday, March 8. Sanju Samson's sensational 89 and Jasprit Bumrah's magical four-wicket haul ensured India became the first team to lift three men's T20 World Cup titles.

Gautam Gambhir silences critics, completes rare T20 World Cup player–coach doubleGautam Gambhir completed a rare player–coach double in the T20 World Cup as India defeated New Zealand in the 2026 final at the Narendra Modi Stadium. Having been part of India's title-winning side in 2007, Gambhir has now lifted the trophy as head coach, answering critics who had questioned his aggressive tactics and bold selections.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
